stemHtml: Thunderstorm activity takes place in the vicinity of an airport. During the take-off roll, the crew notices rapid build-up of airspeed. Soon after lift-off, the Ground Proximity Warning activates and the aircraft loses altitude. The most probable cause is a microburst which, by the start of the take-off roll, has formed…

options.a: Right of the RWY, abeam the threshold.
options.b: Left of the RWY, abeam the threshold.
options.c: On the RWY, ahead of the aircraft.
